name: remotion-scenes
description: Turn a video script into a working Remotion project: script -> scenes prompt -> scaffolded project with animations.

interface.shortDescription: Turn scripts into Remotion scene prompts and projects
interface.longDescription: Generate a structured scenes prompt from a video script, then scaffold a Remotion project from that prompt using a two-step Codex workflow.
defaultPrompt: Use script-to-prompt to turn my script into a scenes prompt
Use prompt-to-project with this scenes prompt
